scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api "wait-on tcp:8000 && pnpm dev:web" "pnpm dev:api"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @streaming-chat/web typecheck && uv run --project apps/api python -m pytest -c apps/api/pyproject.toml apps/api/tests/unit/test_settings.py -s
scripts.test: uv run --project apps/api python -m pytest -c apps/api/pyproject.toml apps/api/tests -s && pnpm --filter @streaming-chat/web test
scripts.test:api: uv run --project apps/api python -m pytest -c apps/api/pyproject.toml apps/api/tests -s
scripts.test:api:llm: uv run --project apps/api python -m pytest -c apps/api/pyproject.toml -m llm apps/api/tests -s
